howItWorks.intro: This hydraulic cylinder force calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Push Force
rules.explanation: Push force uses the full bore area times pressure.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: Force equals bore area times system pressure. Pull force subtracts the rod area.
Most industrial hydraulic systems run 2000-5000 PSI.
